news_items.headline: Happ gets day off, PCA batting leadoff for Cubs
news_items.summary: The Cubs are giving struggling left fielder Ian Happ the day off while moving centerfielder Pete Crow-Armstrong up to the leadoff spot for Saturday's game against the Astros.

news_items.headline: Manzardo's pinch-hit HR saves Williams' 11-K gem
news_items.summary: Gavin Williams matched Phillies ace Cristopher Sanchez with eight scoreless innings before Kyle Manzardo delivered a pinch-hit homer in the ninth inning to lift the Guardians to a 1-0 victory.

news_items.headline: Yanks' Cole tosses 6 scoreless after 569-day layof...
news_items.summary: Yankees ace Gerrit Cole pitched six shutout innings in his return from elbow ligament reconstruction that caused a 569-day absence.

news_items.headline: BoSox's Story undergoes sports hernia surgery
news_items.summary: Struggling Boston Red Sox shortstop Trevor Story could be out several weeks after sports hernia surgery.

news_items.headline: Dodgers' Muncy exits after getting hit by a pitch
news_items.summary: Dodgers slugger Max Muncy is cautiously optimistic that he avoided a serious injury after a pitch hit him in the right wrist Friday night against the Brewers.

news_items.headline: Holliday sneaks 337-foot homer under foul pole
news_items.summary: Jackson Holliday hit a two-run shot in the fourth inning that went 337 feet and sneaked just over the wall and under the foul pole in left field in Friday's 7-4 win over the Tigers.

news_items.headline: D-backs' Gurriel exits game with tight hamstring
news_items.summary: Arizona left fielder Lourdes Gurriel Jr. left the Diamondbacks' game Friday night against the Colorado Rockies because of left hamstring tightness after making a sliding catch.

news_items.headline: Three potential paths forward for the Astros: From...
news_items.summary: Keep going for it, soft rebuild or start from scratch? Houston has a decision to make, sooner rather than later.

news_items.headline: Astros vs Cubs Game Thread: Game 53, 5/23/2026
news_items.summary: TODAY’S GAME:The Astros and Cubs will play the second game of their three-game series this afternoon at Wrigley Field. Houston will send RHP Kai-Wei Teng (2-3) to the mound against Cubs RHP Colin Rea (4-2). IN THE DAYTIME:Today marks the third of four consecutive scheduled day games for the Astros. Wednesday’s series finale in Minnesota […]

news_items.summary: Back to business after a late night to clinch a series win.

news_items.headline: Is A Jump In Talent Nigh?
news_items.summary: This season’s first 2 months have always been about treading water. The A’s have a gloriously average squad that has been, well, average : Since April 10th, the A’s have been been between 1 game under .500 and 3 games over .500 each and every day. The ability to stay neck and neck in the […]

Cardinals vs Reds Prediction, Picks & Odds for Tonight's MLB Game 2
news_items.summary: Kyle Leahy will get crushed in the latter half of a doubleheader in Cincinnati. Free Cardinals vs. Reds predictions for Game 2 on Saturday, May 23.

news_items.summary: The Mets are bringing up a fresh arm to join the bullpen.

news_items.headline: Game Discussion for St. Louis Cardinals vs Cincinnati Reds Saturday
news_items.summary: The bad news was Friday night’s game between the St. Louis Cardinals and Cincinnati Reds was rained out. The good news is that means a doubleheader today. For game 1, it appears that the Cardinals will have Andre Pallante make the start while the Reds will have Friday’s planned starter Chris Paddack on the mound. […]
